mapper.insert: insert ignore into post_bookmark(user_id, post_id, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{postId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select p.id as id, p.user_id as user_id, p.category_id as category_id, p.title as title, p.content as content, p.type as type, p.status as status, p.create_time as create_time, p.update_time as update_time, p.edit_count as edit_count, p.deleted_by as deleted_by, p.deleted_reason as deleted_reason, p.deleted_time as deleted_time, p.comment_count as comment_count, p.score as score from post_bookmark b join discuss_post p on b.post_id = p.id where b.user_id = #{userId} and p.status != 2 order by b.create_time desc, p.id desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
